The '''''Rejuvenator''-class Star Destroyer''' was a class of [[Warship/Legends|warship]] used by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].

==History==
These [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] were created by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> The ''Rejuvenator''s continued in service of the Galactic Alliance and were part of major campaigns in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], during the last months of the war against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="TUF" />

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{1st}}
